paper_title: DROP: A Reading Comprehension Benchmark Requiring Discrete Reasoning Over Paragraphs
evaluation_method: DROP is a 55k-question reading comprehension benchmark requiring discrete reasoning (addition, counting, sorting) over paragraphs. The official evaluation uses two custom metrics: (1) Exact Match (EM) measures the percentage of predictions that exactly match the gold answer after normalization. (2) F1 measures the token-level overlap between prediction and gold answer using bag-of-words. For number answers, EM requires exact numeric match. For date answers, EM requires all date components to match. For span answers, standard string EM and token-level F1 are used. The final score is the max over all gold answers for each question.
